overview: Frost Wolf is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ice Cavern. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 60 HP, 17 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Dash Bite at 140% ratio (238 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Dash Bite.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 5 melee attacks. Common Wolf Attack Forward (120%), Common Wolf Attack Left (120%), Common Wolf Attack Right (120%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 2 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Common Wolf Attack Jump (120%), Dash Bite (140%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Dash Bite
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Dash Bite. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Dash Bite

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
